transcript.clean_text: foreign is live and On Demand each and every stage on gcn Plus turning up for Stage 15 was a brand new leader decked out in pink with Primo's roglich and Company concentrating on the GC battle that was left over the remaining seven stages Stage 15 was the end of the second block of racing a mini Giro di lombardier four of the famous climbs often in The Big Race that's held in the Autumn this time in Spring but we'd had wintry weather for this point things thankfully are about to change couple loops around Bergamo the chitade in Italy two Rises and descents from its famous Old Town 195 kilometers with 4 000 meters of climbing the stage started with the predictable early attacks for the Breakaway a possibility that a break could go all day oh and every effort made to try and get out there in the end a good group of riders just under 20 in fact by the way Aina Rubio would be the most dangerous in the general classification at over 11 minutes he took a while to get there but would reach the front as kupamaji started to set the pace for Bruno almirai leading a grand tour for the first time in his career but then it was a difficult one Alberto deinese one of the few sprinters who made the Breakaway and he was already starting to struggle on the first climb the valikudi valcava at the top of the climb it was almost like a Sprint finish elbows out for the king of the mountains points then Healy winning that particular battle against Aina Rubio Sensational scenery salvino and all of its hairpins and the Gap looking like it was going to be let go for the break to stake the stage Healy and Rubio once again going at it and heading into the final climb of the day again a sprinter trying to get up the road Nicolo Bonifacio with a head start but behind they will be ridden back on for at least those who were strong enough and when bonifatti was caught Marco frigo young Italian rider for Israel Premier Tech would go away McNulty would follow him Healy would go after him as well leaving Rubio behind and then there were three with 35ks to go but not for long Healy going it alone having already won a stage attacking from 50 kilometers to go this time it was a little closer but this time too he'd be well chased and well monitored Brandon McNulty closing the Gap bit by bit he catch the Irishman on The Descent with three got this point still at almost 40 seconds but there'd be three once more together with 10 kilometers to go three young men three stars all battling it out Heely the strongest on the climbs little doubt about that fried Eagle dropped once more with 3.6 K's to go just on the outskirts of modern Bergamot in its old cobbled streets and Hills it was where it was played out Healy and McNulty call to gain this time inside the final 500 meters frigo was really flying to give it his best and he'd launch his Sprint over the top Healy closing the Gap McNulty coming around and after five grand Tours a few times trying Brandon McNulty would finally get his own victory in a Grand Tour stage one of his objectives achieved UAE taking their second win of the race congratulations all round after a hard Fort day in the GC group there'd be a few movements Joel maida alongside primage roglich and Garrett Thomas driving things on the front just a couple of seconds of a gap between Tebow Pino and a couple of others caught and Bruno Mar losing just over half a minute but retaining the mayarosa and having over a minute of a league going into the second rest all the glory to McNulty a US stage win at the general d'Italia Brandon McNulty beating Ben Healy and Marco frigo a lovely moment watched on by teammates and with a couple of stage wins in the bag UAE will now look to battle to help draw Almeda onto the podium the lead currently held by a Frenchman the first time in a quarter of a century will know that he will need a miracle if he's the stay there but he goes into rest A2 with a gap of 108 overgar and Thomas roglitch two seconds behind and then it's Almeida leknerson hanging on well with the likes of Caruso kemna and Company all in the top 10. next up a mighty Martin stage surely the race for the GC will be unpaused going into a hellish last week a five-star stage and a return to Monte bondoni for the first time since the naughties Big Mountain after Big Mountain a couple of hundred kilometers starting by the Lakeside heading into trentino from lombardia and a proper stage with a fight for the pink jersey surely we'll get more aggressive Rendezvous after the rest day then my your for now how long will the Frenchman hold the lead will he build a hang on or will it be the big GC man hoping to win this dude Italia that start to take the race by the horns you can watch each and every stage live and On Demand on gcn Plus
